MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Alan Horowitz, Esq. represented plaintiff and Jack Marquez represented the defendant. The Case did not settle and remains on the trial calendar.

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT DANIEL RAPHAEL GREENBLATT'S DEMURRER -- overruled. Defendant has 5 days to answer. (JJM/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein CSR # 4780
